scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,blue "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.db:init: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev --name init && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:deploy: cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
